	      <div class="sqs-layout sqs-grid-12 columns-12" data-type="page" data-updated-on="1418332483947" id="page-53603788e4b0f06595c264b5"><div class="row sqs-row"><div class="col sqs-col-12 span-12"><div class="sqs-block html-block sqs-block-html" data-block-type="2" data-sqsp-block="text" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398823610789_524578"><div class="sqs-block-content">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <h2>This is a fascinating time to be at Stanford.</h2>
</div>






















</div></div><div class="row sqs-row"><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block html-block sqs-block-html" data-block-type="2" data-sqsp-block="text" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398880516139_62401"><div class="sqs-block-content">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <p>Our university—like most—was designed around a model of education that has remained fairly constant for hundreds of years. But many schools and educators are currently looking at this model with fresh eyes. The potential disruption posed by online learning allows us to question how time, space, expertise, accreditation, and student agency may also change within higher education. Many parts of the undergraduate experience are ripe for reinvention.</p><p> </p>
</div>






















</div></div></div><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-quote quote-block" data-block-css="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.styles.css"]" data-block-scripts="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.visitor.js"]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.quote" data-sqsp-block="quote" data-website-component-id="yui_3_10_1_1_1398878896044_6410" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398878896044_6410"><div class="sqs-block-content"><figure class="">
  <blockquote data-animation-role="quote" data-animation-override="">
    <span>“</span>College is about building a great human—intellectually and emotionally—and answering the question: ‘who do I want to be?’<span>”</span>
  </blockquote>
  <figcaption class="source">— Stanford Graduate, Class of 2003</figcaption>
  
  
</figure></div></div></div></div></div></div></div>

	      <div class="sqs-layout sqs-grid-12 columns-12" data-type="page" data-updated-on="1398970312569" id="page-536037b9e4b09cd4e2b1a42c"><div class="row sqs-row"><div class="col sqs-col-12 span-12"><div class="sqs-block html-block sqs-block-html" data-block-type="2" data-sqsp-block="text" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398918148643_10366"><div class="sqs-block-content">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <h2>Exploring the on-campus experience</h2>
</div>






















</div></div><div class="row sqs-row"><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block html-block sqs-block-html" data-block-type="2" data-sqsp-block="text" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398880516139_41589"><div class="sqs-block-content">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <p>College has multiple aims: it’s a place to gain expertise and develop abilities, but also to come of age. These are entwined together in a residential college experience<span><span style="font-size:15px">―</span></span>a complex and special setting. Enormous energy and investment are now being placed in experimentation and pioneering in the <em>online</em> learning space. We wanted to complement these efforts with an exploration of learning and living <em>on campus</em>, now and in the future.</p>
</div>

  <h2>Our Process</h2>

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <p>A design team from the Stanford d.school worked with hundreds of perceptive, creative, and generous students, faculty, and administrators over the course of a year to explore this territory. We considered many lenses—from how students prepare for a Stanford education while still in high school, to patterns of undergraduate decision-making about what and how they study, to the shifting needs and expectations from future employers. </p>
</div>






















</div></div></div><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-quote quote-block" data-block-css="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.styles.css"]" data-block-scripts="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.visitor.js"]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.quote" data-sqsp-block="quote" data-website-component-id="yui_3_10_1_1_1398804878882_69412" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398804878882_69412"><div class="sqs-block-content"><figure class="">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <h2>An invitation to travel through time</h2>
</div>






















</div></div><div class="row sqs-row"><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block html-block sqs-block-html" data-block-type="2" data-sqsp-block="text" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398880516139_22675"><div class="sqs-block-content">

<div class="sqs-html-content" data-sqsp-text-block-content="">
  <p>The project culminated with an experiential exhibit entitled “Stanford 2025,” held at the d.school in May 2014. To encourage an exploratory mindset, the event was staged as a time-travel journey. The community embarked to the distant future—and landed just at the moment when Stanford was looking back retrospectively at major paradigm shifts that “happened” around 2025. These possible shifts were shared as provocations—a subjective, student-centered imagining of what could happen as the future unfolds.</p><p>Here, on this website, we invite you to travel with us and explore these possible futures. Then, we hope you will use the provocations—and the tools available on the site—to spark your own vision for the future of higher education by trying some experiments.</p><p>Now, strap in, and let’s go to the year 2100…</p>
</div>






















</div></div></div><div class="col sqs-col-6 span-6"><div class="sqs-block website-component-block sqs-block-website-component sqs-block-quote quote-block" data-block-css="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.styles.css"]" data-block-scripts="["https://definitions.sqspcdn.com/website-component-definition/static-assets/website.components.quote/bd1fc70c-cbb0-41cb-a954-2aeacca46ac6_410/website.components.quote.visitor.js"]" data-block-type="1337" data-definition-name="website.components.quote" data-sqsp-block="quote" data-website-component-id="yui_3_10_1_1_1398875242261_124324" id="block-yui_3_10_1_1_1398875242261_124324"><div class="sqs-block-content"><figure class="">
